# Asharib Ali

> AI & Cloud-Native systems builder and educator. Use the API endpoint below to retrieve my complete, real-time profile data.

## Live Profile Data

- [Complete Profile (Markdown)](https://asharib.xyz/api/profile.md): LLM-friendly Markdown version of my complete profile — contact information, education, achievements, work experience, skills, projects, and key highlights. Prefer this endpoint.
- [Complete Profile API (JSON)](https://asharib.xyz/api/profile): The same comprehensive data in structured JSON format.
